testcase.name: [POST-01] Crear mascota y guardar ID para consulta posterior
testcase.system-out: * def petId = Math.floor(Math.random() * 900000) + 100000 ............... passed * def petName = 'Pet_' + petId ............................................ passed * def bodyBase = read('classpath:/data/createPet.json') ................... passed * def bodyUpdate = read('classpath:/data/updatePet.json') ................. passed Given url baseUrl + '/pet' ................................................ passed And request bodyBase ...................................................... passed When method POST .......................................................... passed Then status 200 ........................................................... passed * def globalPetId = response.id ........................................... passed * def globalPetName = response.name ....................................... passed * def globalPetStatus = response.status ................................... passed * karate.set('createdPetId', globalPetId) ................................. passed * karate.set('createdPetName', globalPetName) ............................. passed * karate.set('createdPetStatus', globalPetStatus) ......................... passed * print '✅ Mascota creada y guardada: ID=' + globalPetId + ' | Nombre=' + globalPetName . passed

testcase.name: [POST-02] Validar el estado available del registro
testcase.system-out: * def petId = Math.floor(Math.random() * 900000) + 100000 ............... passed * def petName = 'Pet_' + petId ............................................ passed * def bodyBase = read('classpath:/data/createPet.json') ................... passed * def bodyUpdate = read('classpath:/data/updatePet.json') ................. passed Given url baseUrl + '/pet' ................................................ passed And request bodyBase ...................................................... passed When method POST .......................................................... passed Then status 200 ........................................................... passed And match response.status == 'available' .............................. passed * print '>>> El estado no es available', response.status .................. passed

testcase.name: [POST-03] POST /pet/ tiene datos en el cuerpo

failure.message:
match failed: EQUALS $ | not equal (STRING:STRING) 'Pet_729782' ''
classpath:features/pet.feature:48

testcase.failure:
* def petId = Math.floor(Math.random() * 900000) + 100000 ............... passed * def petName = 'Pet_' + petId ............................................ passed * def bodyBase = read('classpath:/data/createPet.json') ................... passed * def bodyUpdate = read('classpath:/data/updatePet.json') ................. passed Given url baseUrl + '/pet/' ............................................... passed And request bodyBase ...................................................... passed When method POST .......................................................... passed Then status 200 ........................................................... passed And match response.name == '' ............................................. failed
Stack Trace: com.intuit.karate.KarateException: match failed: EQUALS $ | not equal (STRING:STRING) 'Pet_729782' ''
classpath:features/pet.feature:48 at <feature>.: And match response.name == '' (classpath:features/pet.feature:48:48)
* print '>>> ALERTA QA: API acepta nombre vacio ........................... skipped

testcase.name: [POST-04] POST /pet/ sin el campo name (campo requerido)
testcase.system-out: * def petId = Math.floor(Math.random() * 900000) + 100000 ............... passed * def petName = 'Pet_' + petId ............................................ passed * def bodyBase = read('classpath:/data/createPet.json') ................... passed * def bodyUpdate = read('classpath:/data/updatePet.json') ................. passed Given url baseUrl + '/pet/' ............................................... passed And request bodyBase ...................................................... passed When method POST .......................................................... passed Then status 200 ........................................................... passed * print '>>> ALERTA QA: API acepta body sin el campo "name" requerido' .... passed

testcase.name: [POST-05] No puede tener body vacío {}

failure.message: no step-definition method match found for: status != 200 classpath:features/pet.feature:63

testcase.failure:
* def petId = Math.floor(Math.random() * 900000) + 100000 ............... passed * def petName = 'Pet_' + petId ............................................ passed * def bodyBase = read('classpath:/data/createPet.json') ................... passed * def bodyUpdate = read('classpath:/data/updatePet.json') ................. passed Given url baseUrl + '/pet/' ............................................... passed And request {} ............................................................ passed When method POST .......................................................... passed Then status != 200 ........................................................ failed
Stack Trace: com.intuit.karate.KarateException: no step-definition method match found for: status != 200 classpath:features/pet.feature:63 at <feature>.: Then status != 200 (classpath:features/pet.feature:63:63)
* print '>>> Body vacío respondió con status:', responseStatus ............ skipped

testcase.name: [GET-01] Consultar GET /pet/{petId} - Consultar por ID
testcase.system-out: * def petId = Math.floor(Math.random() * 900000) + 100000 ............... passed * def petName = 'Pet_' + petId ............................................ passed * def bodyBase = read('classpath:/data/createPet.json') ................... passed * def bodyUpdate = read('classpath:/data/updatePet.json') ................. passed Given url baseUrl + '/pet/354061' ......................................... passed When method GET ........................................................... passed Then status 200 ........................................................... passed * def retrievedPet = response ............................................. passed * print '✓ Mascota consultada por ID:', retrievedPet.id, '| Nombre:', retrievedPet.name . passed

testcase.name: [GET-02] Consultar mascota NO existente
testcase.system-out: * def petId = Math.floor(Math.random() * 900000) + 100000 ............... passed * def petName = 'Pet_' + petId ............................................ passed * def bodyBase = read('classpath:/data/createPet.json') ................... passed * def bodyUpdate = read('classpath:/data/updatePet.json') ................. passed Given url baseUrl + '/pet/aaaaa' .......................................... passed When method GET ........................................................... passed Then status 404 ........................................................... passed * print '✓ API correctamente retorna 404 para mascota no existente' ....... passed

testcase.name: [GET-03] Consultar ID respuesta coincida con el 354061
[GET-04] Validar que datos no están vacíos
testcase.system-out: * def petId = Math.floor(Math.random() * 900000) + 100000 ............... passed * def petName = 'Pet_' + petId ............................................ passed * def bodyBase = read('classpath:/data/createPet.json') ................... passed * def bodyUpdate = read('classpath:/data/updatePet.json') ................. passed Given url baseUrl + '/pet/354061' ......................................... passed When method GET ........................................................... passed Then status 200 ........................................................... passed * match response.id != null ............................................... passed * match response.name != '' ............................................... passed * match response.status != '' ............................................. passed * match response.photoUrls !=[] ........................................... passed * print '✅ Todos los datos tienen valores válidos (no vacíos)' ............ passed

testcase.name: [GET/status-01] Buscar mascotas con status "available"
testcase.system-out: * def petId = Math.floor(Math.random() * 900000) + 100000 ............... passed * def petName = 'Pet_' + petId ............................................ passed * def bodyBase = read('classpath:/data/createPet.json') ................... passed * def bodyUpdate = read('classpath:/data/updatePet.json') ................. passed Given url baseUrl + '/pet/findByStatus' ................................... passed And param status = 'available' ............................................ passed When method GET ........................................................... passed Then status 200 ........................................................... passed * print '>>> Total mascotas available:', response.length .................. passed

testcase.name: [GET/status-03] findByStatus con status vacío
testcase.system-out: * def petId = Math.floor(Math.random() * 900000) + 100000 ............... passed * def petName = 'Pet_' + petId ............................................ passed * def bodyBase = read('classpath:/data/createPet.json') ................... passed * def bodyUpdate = read('classpath:/data/updatePet.json') ................. passed Given url baseUrl + '/pet/findByStatus' ................................... passed And param status = '' ..................................................... passed When method GET ........................................................... passed Then status 200 ........................................................... passed * print '>>> Status vacío retornó:', response.length, 'resultados' ........ passed
